_header: Each entry defines a named release as a half-open range (old, new]
of commits in the MAM-parsed repo.
'old' is the state before the first change (exclusive boundary);
'new' is the state after the last change (inclusive boundary).
Consecutive releases share a boundary: the 'new' of one release
main_diff_mpp.py also uses these to map --old/--new args to a release
